
```{r}
library(edgeR)
library(limma)
library(pheatmap)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(viridis)
library(RColorBrewer)
```

```{r}
setwd("/disk3/patil/winpro/I3-NGS-Daten/NGS-Fisch/Akshay/MALT/Bulk_RNASeq")

```

```{r}
# Load data
metadata     <- read.csv("samples_metadata.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
count_matrix <- read.table("featurecounts/filtered_counts.txt", header = TRUE, row.names = 1, sep = "\t")

```

```{r}
# Keep only samples present in both
common_samples <- intersect(colnames(count_matrix), metadata$Sample)
if (length(common_samples) == 0) stop("No common samples found between count matrix and metadata.")

count_matrix <- count_matrix[, common_samples]
metadata     <- metadata[match(common_samples, metadata$Sample), ]

# Normalization
dge    <- DGEList(counts = count_matrix)
dge    <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
logcpm <- cpm(dge, normalized.lib.sizes = TRUE, log = TRUE)

# Batch correction
batch_info    <- metadata$Bioproject
design_matrix <- model.matrix(~metadata$Tissue)

logcpm_corrected <- tryCatch({
  removeBatchEffect(logcpm, batch = batch_info, design = design_matrix)
}, warning = function(w) {
  suppressWarnings(removeBatchEffect(logcpm, batch = batch_info, design = design_matrix))
}, error = function(e) {
  return(logcpm)
})

``` 

```{r}
# Keep only samples present in both
common_samples <- intersect(colnames(count_matrix), metadata$Sample)
if (length(common_samples) == 0) stop("No common samples found between count matrix and metadata.")

count_matrix <- count_matrix[, common_samples]
metadata     <- metadata[match(common_samples, metadata$Sample), ]

```

```{r}
# Normalization
dge    <- DGEList(counts = count_matrix)
dge    <- calcNormFactors(dge, method = "TMM")
logcpm <- cpm(dge, normalized.lib.sizes = TRUE, log = TRUE)

```

```{r}
# Batch correction
batch_info    <- metadata$Bioproject
design_matrix <- model.matrix(~metadata$Tissue)

logcpm_corrected <- tryCatch({
  removeBatchEffect(logcpm, batch = batch_info, design = design_matrix)
}, warning = function(w) {
  suppressWarnings(removeBatchEffect(logcpm, batch = batch_info, design = design_matrix))
}, error = function(e) {
  return(logcpm)
})

```

```{r}
# target genes
target_genes <- c("malt1", "malt2", "malt3")

found_genes <- rownames(logcpm_corrected)[tolower(rownames(logcpm_corrected)) %in% tolower(target_genes)]

if (length(found_genes) == 0) {
  found_genes <- grep("^malt[1-3]", rownames(logcpm_corrected), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
}

if (length(found_genes) == 0) stop("Target genes not found in the count matrix.")

target_data <- logcpm_corrected[found_genes, , drop = FALSE]

plot_df <- as.data.frame(target_data) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Gene") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Gene, names_to = "Sample", values_to = "logCPM") %>%
  left_join(metadata, by = "Sample")

font_choice <- "Arial"

```


```{r}
# --- Violin + Boxplot ---
# MALT Gene Expression Across Tissues

p1 <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Tissue, y = logCPM)) +
  geom_violin(aes(fill = Tissue), alpha = 0.3, scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Tissue), alpha = 0.7, width = 0.3,
               outlier.shape = NA, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Bioproject), width = 0.15, size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_viridis(discrete = TRUE, option = "D", name = "Tissue") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "BioProject") +
  labs(
    y = "Log2 CPM (Batch-Corrected)", x = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_family = font_choice) +
  theme(
    strip.text      = element_text(face = "bold.italic", size = 12),
    axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

ggsave("Boxplot_Violin.png", plot = p1, width = 14, height = 7, dpi = 300)

print(p1)

```

```{r}
# Heatmap
p2 <- pheatmap(
  target_data_sorted,
  annotation_col = annotation_sorted,
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  annotation_names_col = TRUE,
  color = colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu")))(200),
  breaks = seq(-2.5, 2.5, length.out = 201),
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
  clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
  clustering_method = "ward.D2",
  show_colnames = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  fontsize_row = 13,
  fontsize_col = 9,
  angle_col = 45,
  fontsize = 11,
  border_color = "grey92",
  cellwidth = 18,
  cellheight = 30,
  legend = TRUE,
  legend_breaks = c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2),
  legend_labels = c("-2 (Low)", "-1", "0", "+1", "+2 (High)"),
)


# print to screen
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(p2$gtable)

# save to file
png("Heatmap.png", width = 12, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(p2$gtable)
dev.off()
```


```{r}
# --- Dot Plot ---

summary_df <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(Tissue, Gene) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_Expression = mean(logCPM),
    SD_Expression   = sd(logCPM),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p3 <- ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = Tissue, y = Gene)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = Mean_Expression, fill = Mean_Expression),
             shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option = "magma", direction = -1, name = "Mean\nLog2 CPM") +
  scale_size(range = c(4, 12), name = "Expression\nLevel") +
  labs(title = "Mean Expression Summary", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_bw(base_family = font_choice) +
  theme(
    plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold.italic", size = 12),
    legend.box  = "vertical"
  )


print(p3)

ggsave("Dotplot.png", plot = p3, width = 9, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```
```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
